Pilot Candidate '''Lussatte''' was [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] and an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] pilot-in-training during the [[Hunt for Zsinj]]. She was a member of the training group [[Gold Squadron (New Republic)|Gold Squadron]] under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sormic]], along with [[Gara Petothel|Lara Notsil]] and [[Lowan]]. Although not as good a pilot as Notsil, Lussatte was competent enough to come up with a plan that gave her an estimated one-in-four to one-in-two chance of survival against more experienced [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] pilots, according to her commanding officer, as he reviewed the performance of Notsil that had gotten them both vaped in an exercise.
